task_description: Multiple bug fixes and UI improvements for the Shogun's Ascent game: Marshal multi-select movement fix, Fujin confirmation step, Kotahi harvest ability, Betrayal flow rework, War phase Zorro flow fix, Legend button positioning, Sol clan color change, diorama figure sizes, Seppuku/Battle result popup enhancements

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes cleanly. No unit tests exist in this project. All features implemented and committed.
